mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DISCOUNT (DISCOUNT_ID, DISCOUNT_NM, DISCOUNT_TYPE, DISCOUNT_VALUE, START_DATE, END_DATE, APPLY_TIME_FROM, APPLY_TIME_TO, APPLY_DAYS, APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID, ROUNDING_UNIT, ROUNDING_TYPE, USE_YN, REMARK, REG_DT) VALUES (#{discountId}, #{discountNm}, #{discountType}, #{discountValue}, #{startDate}NULL, #{endDate}NULL, #{applyTimeFrom}NULL, #{applyTimeTo}NULL, #{applyDays}NULL, #{applyTicketTypeId}NULL, #{roundingUnit}, #{roundingType}, #{useYn}, #{remark}, GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE DISCOUNT SET DISCOUNT_NM = #{discountNm}, DISCOUNT_TYPE = #{discountType}, DISCOUNT_VALUE = #{discountValue}, START_DATE = #{startDate}NULL, END_DATE = #{endDate}NULL, APPLY_TIME_FROM = #{applyTimeFrom}NULL, APPLY_TIME_TO = #{applyTimeTo}NULL, APPLY_DAYS = #{applyDays}NULL, APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID = #{applyTicketTypeId}NULL, ROUNDING_UNIT = #{roundingUnit}, ROUNDING_TYPE = #{roundingType}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE DISCOUNT_ID = #{discountId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM DISCOUNT_PROGRAM WHERE DISCOUNT_ID = #{discountId}; DELETE FROM DISCOUNT WHERE DISCOUNT_ID = #{discountId}
mapper.select: SELECT D.DISCOUNT_ID AS discountId, D.DISCOUNT_NM AS discountNm, D.DISCOUNT_TYPE AS discountType, D.DISCOUNT_VALUE AS discountValue, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), D.START_DATE, 23) AS startDate, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), D.END_DATE, 23) AS endDate, D.APPLY_TIME_FROM AS applyTimeFrom, D.APPLY_TIME_TO AS applyTimeTo, D.APPLY_DAYS AS applyDays, D.APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID AS applyTicketTypeId, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_UNIT, 1) AS roundingUnit, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_TYPE, 'ROUND') AS roundingType, D.USE_YN AS useYn, D.REMARK AS remark, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), D.REG_DT, 120) AS regDt FROM DISCOUNT D WHERE D.DISCOUNT_ID = #{discountId}

SELECT D.DISCOUNT_ID, D.DISCOUNT_NM, D.DISCOUNT_TYPE, D.DISCOUNT_VALUE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), D.START_DATE, 23) AS START_DATE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), D.END_DATE, 23) AS END_DATE, D.APPLY_TIME_FROM, D.APPLY_TIME_TO, D.APPLY_DAYS, D.APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_UNIT, 1) AS ROUNDING_UNIT, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_TYPE, 'ROUND') AS ROUNDING_TYPE, T.TYPE_NM AS APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_NM, (SELECT STRING_AGG(P.PROGRAM_NM + CASE WHEN DP.DISCOUNT_VALUE IS NOT NULL THEN '(' + CAST(DP.DISCOUNT_VALUE AS VARCHAR) + ')' ELSE '' END, ', ') FROM DISCOUNT_PROGRAM DP JOIN PROGRAM P ON DP.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE DP.DISCOUNT_ID = D.DISCOUNT_ID) AS APPLY_PROGRAM_NMS, D.USE_YN, D.REMARK, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), D.REG_DT, 120) AS REG_DT FROM DISCOUNT D LEFT JOIN TICKET_TYPE T ON D.APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID = T.TYPE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND D.DISCOUNT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY D.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DISCOUNT WHERE 1=1
AND DISCOUNT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DISCOUNT_PROGRAM (DISCOUNT_ID, PROGRAM_ID, DISCOUNT_VALUE) VALUES (#{discountId}, #{programId}, #{discountValue}NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT PROGRAM_ID FROM DISCOUNT_PROGRAM WHERE DISCOUNT_ID = #{discountId}

SELECT D.DISCOUNT_ID, D.DISCOUNT_NM, D.DISCOUNT_TYPE, COALESCE(DP.DISCOUNT_VALUE, D.DISCOUNT_VALUE) AS DISCOUNT_VALUE, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_UNIT, 1) AS ROUNDING_UNIT, ISNULL(D.ROUNDING_TYPE, 'ROUND') AS ROUNDING_TYPE, D.APPLY_TIME_FROM, D.APPLY_TIME_TO, D.APPLY_DAYS, D.APPLY_TICKET_TYPE_ID FROM DISCOUNT D LEFT JOIN DISCOUNT_PROGRAM DP ON D.DISCOUNT_ID = DP.DISCOUNT_ID AND DP.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId} WHERE D.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (D.START_DATE IS NULL OR D.START_DATE <= #{eventDate}) AND (D.END_DATE IS NULL OR D.END_DATE >= #{eventDate}) AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DISCOUNT_PROGRAM DP2 WHERE DP2.DISCOUNT_ID = D.DISCOUNT_ID) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DISCOUNT_PROGRAM DP3 WHERE DP3.DISCOUNT_ID = D.DISCOUNT_ID AND DP3.PROGRAM_ID = #{programId}))
